title: Cat Name Generator — Cute, Unique & Random Cat Names
description: Find the perfect cat name. Generate cute, unique, and random cat names by style and gender. Free, instant, runs in your browser — no signup.
headline: Cat name generator for cute, unique, and funny cat names
subhead: Generate the perfect name for your kitten by gender and style — free, instant, and right in your browser.

presets.label: Pick a gender and style, then generate fresh cat names. Tap the heart to save your favorites.

intro: Naming a new cat is harder than it looks. This generator gives you a fresh batch of cat names every time, filtered by gender and the vibe you want — cute, unique, funny, or classic.
Everything runs in your browser, so you can keep generating and saving favorites until you find the one that fits your kitten's personality.

tutorial.title: How to use the cat name generator
steps: Choose a gender filter — male, female, or any.
Pick a style: cute, unique, funny, or classic.
Click "Generate" to get a new batch of cat names.
Tap the heart icon to save names you like to your favorites list.
Keep generating until you find the perfect name for your cat.

faq.question: How does the cat name generator work?
faq.answer: It picks from a curated list of cat names tagged by gender and style, then randomly shuffles a fresh batch each time you click generate. Nothing is sent to a server.

faq.question: Can I get unique or unusual cat names?
faq.answer: Yes. Choose the "unique" style for less common, distinctive names, or "cute" and "funny" for playful options.

faq.question: Are there names for male and female cats?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the gender filter to see male, female, or gender-neutral names that suit any cat.

faq.question: Is the cat name generator free?
faq.answer: Completely free, with no signup. It runs entirely in your browser, so you can generate as many names as you like.
